name: Jellyfin Suite
description: A Jellyfin plugin suite: recently played view, poster sheet generator, and web player enhancer. Downloads fonts on first use.
overview: Browse recently played media with flexible grouping and sorting (day/week/month/quarter/year), multiple sort options and view modes. Generate poster sheets for your library. Enhance the web player with frame stepping, screenshots, and mobile gesture controls. Fonts are downloaded automatically on first use.

name: Jellyfin Suite + Fonts
description: A Jellyfin plugin suite: recently played view, poster sheet generator, and web player enhancer. Includes bundled Latin fonts — no internet access needed.
overview: Same as Jellyfin Suite, but ships with pre-bundled Latin fonts (Roboto, RobotoMono, Oswald, Playfair Display, Cinzel). Choose this variant if your server has restricted internet access or you prefer a self-contained install. CJK fonts (Noto CJK) are still sourced from the system or downloaded separately.
